post.summary:
Create cells locks (e.g. when employee starts to edit a cell). If multiple cells should be locked it is necessary to provide all of them. Otherwise, previously provided cells will be unlocked. The locks are being held for 1 minute, it is necessary to invoke endpoint again to increase the lock period.When lock is created or removed, appropriate WS events are emitted (LOCK, UNLOCK).Currently, the following fields checks are implemented:

TaskAssignment: remainingEstimate, comment, internalComment, uiData.
TaskReport: effort, reportComment, state, stateComment.

get.summary: Find projects using filter
get.description:
Find projects using filter (missing parameters are excluded from filter):
 ?managersLogins contains project.manager AND
 ?seniorManagersLogins contains project.seniorManager AND
 ?ownerLogin = project.owner AND 
 ?employeeLogins in (employeeRoles contains MANAGER => project.manager, SENIOR_MANAGER => project.seniorManager, OWNER => project.owner, MEMBER => project.members, OBSERVER => project.observers)

post.summary: Refresh passed tasks from issue tracker

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

200.description:
If everything is ok

When some tasks passed, every task checked. If task successfully refreshed, it would be added into 'success' list
Otherwise task would be added into 'failed' map in response, where map keys are error codes and value is array of tasks failed with such error
For example: {
success: [{<successfullyUpdatedTask>}],
failed: {'task.not.found':[<task1>, <task2>]
}
Full list of possible codes see in /v1/tasks/refresh/{taskId} method
